warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Adjective endings after 'kein' in all three genders (kein kaltes Wasser, kein heißes Wasser, keine saubere Handtuch) — practice with hotel and everyday vocabulary using the nominative and accusative cases first.
speaking_prompt: You've finished your coffee. Get Maria's attention and ask for the bill. She'll tell you the total — pay and leave a tip.
carry_forward_errors: kein kaltes Wasser (was: kein kalt water) — session 2026-04-30
